extraction.one_line_summary: GANNA Filippo won the 11.5km flat time trial by 28 seconds over KÄMNA Lennard, with SHEFFIELD Magnus third at 29 seconds
tactical_patterns: SHEFFIELD Magnus set early benchmark suggesting young emerging TTers can hold top-5 against established specialists
MCNULTY Brandon seeded 40 seconds on YATES Adam, revealing clear UAE GC hierarchy before mountain stages
KÄMNA Lennard nearly matched GANNA despite reinventing himself from climbing specialist, validates cross-discipline training approach
Late starters benefited from improved weather conditions as rain abated, suggesting starting order bias in variable conditions

rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: 28-second margin on pan-flat course demonstrates dominance extends beyond track pursuits to short road TTs
rider_signals.SHEFFIELD Magnus: positive: third place finish ahead of established specialists shows breakthrough WT-level time trialing capability
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: positive: second place demonstrates successful transformation from youth climber to elite TTer, German TT champion credentials validated
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: seeded two seconds to SHEFFIELD at turn, confirmed as UAE's protected GC rider over YATES
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: 40 seconds lost to teammate MCNULTY eliminates him from GC contention before mountains begin
rider_signals.HEPBURN Michael: positive: slotted between two Americans suggests Jayco have deeper TT strength than expected beyond GC leaders
rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: positive: third quickest at checkpoint eight seconds down reveals hidden TT strength for climber-classified rider
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: seeded alongside LUTSENKO and KELDERMAN, suggesting conservative ride rather than stage hunting
